rationale: All four words are present with correct text, weights, and colors: SHIP/FAST/BREAK in heavy white and NOTHING larger in yellow, optically centered with consistent spacing and nothing clipped. The filmstrip shows the staggered reading-order build (SHIP, then through BREAK, then NOTHING) but the stagger reads closer to ~0.5s than the briefed ~0.25s, and the hold occupies tiles 4-10 (~3s) with no visible pulse on NOTHING and no overshoot pop captured. The exit is not evidenced anywhere in the strip — the last tile still shows the fully centered block while the 100% still is black, so the fly-out reads as an abrupt disappearance rather than the briefed alternating horizontal exit. Typography and contrast are clean and near broadcast-ready; one timing/exit revision pass would be needed.
